'''鈭歡-l-m''' ('''kagalam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knauvshawl|knauvshawl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knauvshawl|knauvshawl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| kagalam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalam|thigalam]] || [[word:jigalam|jigalam]] || [[word:shigalam|shigalam]] || [[word:kigalam|kigalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalam|thuthugalam]] || [[word:jujugalam|jujugalam]] || [[word:shushugalam|shushugalam]] || [[word:kukugalam|kukugalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalam|thugalam]] || [[word:jugalam|jugalam]] || [[word:shugalam|shugalam]] || [[word:kugalam|kugalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalam|thugalam]] || [[word:jugalam|jugalam]] || [[word:shugalam|shugalam]] || [[word:kugalam|kugalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalam|thegalam]] || [[word:jegalam|jegalam]] || [[word:shegalam|shegalam]] || [[word:kegalam|kegalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalam|thothogalam]] || [[word:jojogalam|jojogalam]] || [[word:shoshogalam|shoshogalam]] || [[word:kokogalam|kokogalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalam|thogalam]] || [[word:jogalam|jogalam]] || [[word:shogalam|shogalam]] || [[word:kogalam|kogalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalam|thogalam]] || [[word:jogalam|jogalam]] || [[word:shogalam|shogalam]] || [[word:kogalam|kogalam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]] || [[word:galam|galam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙galam|th忙galam]] || [[word:j忙galam|j忙galam]] || [[word:sh忙galam|sh忙galam]] || [[word:k忙galam|k忙galam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalam|thathagalam]] || [[word:jajagalam|jajagalam]] || [[word:shashagalam|shashagalam]] || [[word:kakagalam|kakagalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalam|thagalam]] || [[word:jagalam|jagalam]] || [[word:shagalam|shagalam]] || [[word:kagalam|kagalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalam|thagalam]] || [[word:jagalam|jagalam]] || [[word:shagalam|shagalam]] || [[word:kagalam|kagalam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagalam|shagalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagalam|goshagalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagalam|gokishagalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagalamn眉|shagalamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagalamnkn眉|goshagalamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalamn眉|gokishagalamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagalamsh毛|shagalamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagalamnksh毛|goshagalamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagalamsh毛|gokishagalamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalamro|shagalamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalamnkro|goshagalamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalamro|gokishagalamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalammu|shagalammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalamnkmu|goshagalamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalammu|gokishagalammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagalamsher|shagalamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagalamnksher|goshagalamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagalamsher|gokishagalamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagalamng|shagalamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagalamnkng|goshagalamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagalamng|gokishagalamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagalamya|shagalamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagalamnkya|goshagalamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagalamya|gokishagalamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagalamyam|shagalamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagalamnkyam|goshagalamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagalamyam|gokishagalamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalamn眉sh毛|shagalamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalamnkn眉sh毛|goshagalamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalamn眉sh毛|gokishagalamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalamn眉ro|shagalamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalamnkn眉ro|goshagalamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalamn眉ro|gokishagalamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalamn眉mu|shagalamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalamnkn眉mu|goshagalamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalamn眉mu|gokishagalamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalamsh毛n眉|shagalamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalamnksh毛n眉|goshagalamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalamsh毛n眉|gokishagalamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalamsh毛ro|shagalamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalamnksh毛ro|goshagalamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalamsh毛ro|gokishagalamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalamsh毛mu|shagalamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalamnksh毛mu|goshagalamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalamsh毛mu|gokishagalamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalamron眉|shagalamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalamnkron眉|goshagalamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalamron眉|gokishagalamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalamrosh毛|shagalamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalamnkrosh毛|goshagalamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalamrosh毛|gokishagalamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalamromu|shagalamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalamnkromu|goshagalamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalamromu|gokishagalamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalammun眉|shagalammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalamnkmun眉|goshagalamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalammun眉|gokishagalammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalammush毛|shagalammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalamnkmush毛|goshagalamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalammush毛|gokishagalammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalammuro|shagalammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalamnkmuro|goshagalamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalammuro|gokishagalammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|d414c41}}
